title: Peppery Crunchy Vegetarian Cannellini Beans Stir-fry
description: This dish is a monsoon-inspired Venezuelan creation featuring crisp cannellini beans seasoned with savory peppery notes for a vibrant and satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: 1 teaspoon ground cumin
ingredients.notes: for flavoring the beans and vegetables

ingredients.name: Juice of 1 lime
ingredients.notes: for a bright citrus pop and acidity

instructions: Rinse the cannellini beans under cold water.
In a large skillet or wok, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the onion and garlic, sautéing until translucent about 3 minutes.
Add the chopped bell pepper to the skillet and cook for another minute until slightly softened.
Push vegetables to one side of the pan and add cannellini beans to the other side. Cook for a few more minutes until they start to brown lightly.
Pour in the cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and freshly ground black pepper over the beans. Toss everything together well.
Deglaze the skillet with lime juice. Stir well to coat all ingredients evenly.
If desired, finish by adding a handful of chopped fresh parsley for extra freshness.
